svg.title: A week inside ClickCoach
svg.desc: Horizontal timeline showing the daily coaching workflow Monday through Friday inside ClickCoach, with the central platform connecting all five days.

g.text: Sessions · Stats · Homework · Billing · Courses · Broadcasts · AI

svg.text: One login replaces Calendly, Stripe, Notion, ConvertKit, Typeform, Dropbox, your CRM, and the ChatGPT tab.
